input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.6.2.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.6.2.5
            TITLE: if the vehicle has a tire puncture,

            CONTENT:
            rule D.6.2.5: If the vehicle has a tire puncture,
D.6.2.5 If the vehicle has a tire puncture,  
a. The wheel and tire may be replaced with an identical wheel and tire 
b. When the puncture is caused by track debris and not a result of component failure or the 
vehicle itself, the tire change time will not count towards the team’s total time.

final_answer: rule D.6.2.5: If the vehicle has a tire puncture, D.6.2.5 If the vehicle has a tire puncture, a. The wheel and tire may be replaced with an identical wheel and tire b. When the puncture is caused by track debris and not a result of component failure or the vehicle itself, the tire change time will not count towards the team’s total time.
